sections.paragraph:
μεσάζω (s. μεσόω; Hippocr. et al.; Diod S 1, 32, 9; PSI 151, 6; Wsd 18:14) be in or at the middle J 7:14 v.l. (Ps.-Callisth. 3, 26, 7 p. 127, 2 θέρους μεσάζοντος); s. μεσόω.—DELG s.v. μέσος.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Ps.-Callisth Ps.-Callisth , Historia Alexandri Magni, II–III? a.d.—Lists 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 634
